## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`uv run ruff check .`)
- [ ] Types check (`uv run mypy src/`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format
